_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: selimxsuha
data.message:
Updated README (#101)

All the links are updated in the README file to point to the correct API documentation and repository for Foxy. 
Additionally, the CLI argument formatting was fixed to adapt with the ROS2 syntax where arguments are passed using the format "joy_config:=xbox360" instead of using square brackets "[joy_config:=xbox360]"

data.author: process1183
data.message:
Add parameter to enable the OI mode reporting bug workaround (#95)

* Add parameter to enable the OI mode reporting bug workaround

https://github.com/AutonomyLab/create_robot/issues/64

* Add myself to contributors list

data.author: pgold
data.message:
Port to ROS 2 (foxy) (#8)

* CMake required version bumped to 3.5.

* Fix README prerequisites.

* Remove unneeded CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD.

* Remove CreateDriver's priv_nh_ member.

data.author: kmoriarty
data.message:
removed 'TO DO'

changed '' [](* Documentation: TODO)'' to an invisible comment. 
Any other future to-do list items can be hidden (if included within the HTML comment).

data.author: trainman419
data.message:
Update README with correct path for commands

ROS answers user had a hard time following instructions as written; updated them to be more explicit about where each command should be executed.
